question_text:
Given the following quarterly exposure information and the notes provided, answer the following:
(a) Calculate the 2017 policy year earned exposures as of March 31, 2018.
(b) Calculate the in-force exposures as of May 31, 2018.
(c) Calculate the calendar year 2018 unearned exposures.
(d) Calculate the calendar year 2019 quarter 1 earned exposures.

notes: The company started writing business on January 1, 2017.
The company stopped writing business on December 31, 2018.
The quarterly earnings pattern was set by analyzing historical experience across the industry and is not uniform.
All policies are annual and written on the first day of the quarter.
No policy cancellations or mid-term adjustments.
